        "4 Augmentations",
        "8 Augmentations",
        "16 Augmentations",
    ]
    colors = ["C0", "green", "orange", "purple"]
    markers = ["o", "s", "^", "D"]

    for idx, (condition, label) in enumerate(zip(conditions, labels)):
        all_preds = []
        for exp_data in all_experiment_data:
            if condition in exp_data:
                all_preds.append(exp_data[condition]["predictions"])

        if len(all_preds) > 0:
            all_preds = np.array(all_preds)
            mean_preds = np.mean(all_preds, axis=0)
            std_error = np.std(all_preds, axis=0) / np.sqrt(len(all_preds))

            plt.errorbar(
                y_true,
                mean_preds,
                yerr=std_error,
                fmt=markers[idx],
                alpha=0.6,
                markersize=8,
                label=label,
                color=colors[idx],
                capsize=3,
            )

    plt.plot(
        [y_true.min(), y_true.max()],
        [y_true.min(), y_true.max()],
        "k--",
        linewidth=2,
        label="Perfect Prediction",
    )
    plt.xlabel("Ground Truth Accuracy (%)", fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel("Predicted Accuracy (%)", fontsize=12)
    plt.title(
        "CIFAR-10 Property Predictor: Predictions vs Ground Truth (Mean ± SE)",
        fontsize=14,
    )
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    plt.savefig(
        os.path.join(working_dir, "cifar10_predictions_vs_ground_truth_aggregated.png"),
        dpi=150,
        bbox_inches="tight",
    )
    plt.close()
    print("Created aggregated predictions scatter plot")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error creating aggregated predictions scatter plot: {e}")
    plt.close()

# Plot 5: Aggregated Performance Summary with error bars
try:
    fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))

    conditions = ["without_augmentation"] + [f"num_aug_{n}" for n in [2, 4, 8, 16]]
    x_labels = ["No Aug", "2", "4", "8", "16"]
    aug_values = [2, 4, 8, 16]

    # Collect final MAEs across all runs
    all_final_maes = []
    for condition in conditions:
        condition_maes = []
        for exp_data in all_experiment_data:
            if condition in exp_data:
                condition_maes.append(exp_data[condition]["metrics"]["val"][-1])
        all_final_maes.append(condition_maes)

    mean_maes = [np.mean(maes) for maes in all_final_maes]
    std_errors = [
        np.std(maes) / np.sqrt(len(maes)) if len(maes) > 0 else 0
        for maes in all_final_maes
    ]

    # Bar plot with error bars
    colors = ["gray", "blue", "green", "orange", "red"]
    bars = ax1.bar(
        x_labels,
        mean_maes,
        yerr=std_errors,
        color=colors,
        alpha=0.7,
        edgecolor="black",
        linewidth=1.5,
        capsize=5,
        error_kw={"linewidth": 2},
    )
    ax1.set_xlabel("Number of Augmentations per Model", fontsize=12)
    ax1.set_ylabel("Final Validation MAE (%)", fontsize=12)
    ax1.set_title(
        "CIFAR-10: Effect of Augmentation on Final Performance (Mean ± SE)", fontsize=13
    )
    ax1.grid(True, axis="y", alpha=0.3)
    for i, (bar, mae, err) in enumerate(zip(bars, mean_maes, std_errors)):
        height = bar.get_height()
        ax1.text(
            bar.get_x() + bar.get_width() / 2.0,
            height + err,
            f"{mae:.3f}",
            ha="center",
            va="bottom",
            fontsize=10,
            fontweight="bold",
        )

    # Performance vs Training Set Size
    training_sizes = [35] + [35 * (1 + n) for n in aug_values]
    ax2.errorbar(
        training_sizes,
        mean_maes,
        yerr=std_errors,
        marker="o",
        linewidth=2.5,
        markersize=10,
        color="purple",
        capsize=5,
        capthick=2,
        label="Mean ± SE",
    )
    ax2.set_xlabel("Training Set Size", fontsize=12)
    ax2.set_ylabel("Final Validation MAE (%)", fontsize=12)
    ax2.set_title("CIFAR-10: Performance vs Training Set Size (Mean ± SE)", fontsize=13)
    ax2.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    ax2.legend()

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(
        os.path.join(
            working_dir, "cifar10_augmentation_performance_summary_aggregated.png"
        ),
        dpi=150,
        bbox_inches="tight",
    )
    plt.close()
    print("Created aggregated performance summary plot")

    # Print summary statistics
    print("\n=== Summary Statistics ===")
    for label, mean_mae, std_err in zip(x_labels, mean_maes, std_errors):
        print(f"{label}: MAE = {mean_mae:.4f} ± {std_err:.4f}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error creating aggregated performance summary plot: {e}")
    plt.close()
